title: dryas octopetala var. incanescens
intro: Dryas octopetala var. incanescens, also known as the White Mountain Dryad or Mountain Avens, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Dryas octopetala plant, native to high-altitude mountainous regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and alleviating pain, as well as acting as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent to heal wounds and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
